summary: CI/CD Pipeline Hardening features fully verified. All 3 backend APIs working (POST /api/ops/deploys, GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploys, GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-stats). Frontend Deploy tab in Control Plane shows stat cards, environment breakdown, and deploy history with expandable smoke test results. CHANGELOG line 474 correctly shows VITE_BACKEND_URL (not REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL).

issues: i18n translation keys showing instead of translated text (common.welcome, auth.signIn) - known issue from previous iteration

critical_code_review_comments: Backend deploy_tracker.py correctly records deploy events with sha, environment, status, actor, branch, smoke_test, rollback fields
Backend dashboard_router.py correctly exposes 3 new endpoints: GET /deploys, GET /deploy-stats, POST /deploys via deploy_router
Backend router_registry.py correctly registers deploy_router with tag 'Deploy Events'
Frontend DeployDashboard.jsx properly displays stat cards (total deploys, success rate, rollbacks, last deploy)
Frontend DeployDashboard.jsx properly displays environment breakdown cards with success rates
Frontend DeployDashboard.jsx properly displays deploy history with expandable rows showing smoke test results table
Frontend ControlPlane.jsx correctly includes Deploy tab with Rocket icon and data-testid='tab-deploys'
CHANGELOG.md line 474 correctly shows VITE_BACKEND_URL (migration from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL complete)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test deploy events via pytest (pytest-env, pytest-staging, pytest-minimal environments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deploy tracker feature fully verified. Three new API endpoints working: POST /api/ops/deploys (record deploy event), GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploys (deploy history), GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploy-stats (aggregated statistics). Frontend renders at /control-plane with Deploy tab (data-testid='tab-deploys'). Deploy dashboard shows 4 stat cards, environment breakdown cards, and deploy history list with expandable rows showing smoke test results. 8 deploy events in DB (4 seeded + 4 from pytest). CHANGELOG line 474 VITE_BACKEND_URL fix verified.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/deploys.returns: {deploys: [...], count: N} - sorted newest first, supports environment filter and limit

frontend_elements.tab-deploys: PASS - Deploy tab visible with Rocket icon
frontend_elements.deploy-row-expandable: PASS - Rows expand to show smoke test results
frontend_elements.smoke-test-table: PASS - Shows endpoint, status, latency, result columns
